title: monogramma robusta
intro: Monogramma robusta, also known as the rock cap fern, is a type of epiphytic fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Monogramma robusta include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin infections, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, or applied topically as a poultice or ointment to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
